name: turismo-huamanga
description: Sistema de Turismo Inteligente Huamanga - PWA mobile-first (Next.js 15 + Spring Boot 3 + PostgreSQL/PostGIS)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,yellow "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm api:dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && cd apps/api && mvnw.cmd test
